title: Prompt Rendering: Templates + Guidelines Injection
summary: Complete, run-specific prompts for dev and reviewer roles. Package internal/prompt provides static role prompts (prompts/dev.md, prompts/reviewer.md) as system prompts, Go templates for user prompts that inject issue context, guidelines, verify_command, and explicit step lists. Missing guidelines files cause a fail-closed error.

stakeholder_intent.goal: Render a complete, self-contained prompt for a role (dev or reviewer) with all run-specific facts injected
stakeholder_intent.business_value: Eliminates implicit context: agents never need to discover issue details, branch names, or guidelines on their own. The prompt contains everything they need, reducing agent errors and gh round-trips.
stakeholder_intent.trigger: Runner is about to invoke a role headless (I1.6) and needs the prompt text
stakeholder_intent.success_outcome: A rendered prompt string containing all run-specific facts (issue, branch, verify_command, guidelines) is returned, ready to be passed to the agent CLI

in_scope: Static role prompts: prompts/dev.md (system prompt for dev), prompts/reviewer.md (system prompt for reviewer)
Go templates for user prompts: dev and reviewer templates
Dev template: issue number, title, body inline, branch name, verify_command, guidelines/dev.md content, explicit step list ending with golemic open-pr call (only after verify_command exit 0)
Reviewer template: PR number, issue inline, verify_command, guidelines/reviewer.md content, step list (diff → verify_command → review → golemic submit-review)
Missing guidelines file → error (fail-closed, not empty string)
out_of_scope: Prompt file storage beyond the static prompts

preconditions: prompts/dev.md and prompts/reviewer.md exist in the prompts/ directory
Guidelines files exist under .golemic/guidelines/ (must be filled by human; missing → error)

business_rules.rule: The dev user prompt must include the full issue body inline (no gh round-trip needed by the agent)
business_rules.outcome: Issue number, title, and body are injected verbatim into the template

business_rules.rule: The dev step list must end with the literal golemic open-pr command and the rule that it may only be called after verify_command exits 0
business_rules.outcome: The step list includes 'Run verify_command' and 'Only after verify_command exits 0, call golemic open-pr --title ... --body ...'

business_rules.rule: The reviewer user prompt must include the PR number and the full issue body inline
business_rules.outcome: PR number and issue are injected verbatim

business_rules.rule: The reviewer step list must end with exactly one golemic submit-review call
business_rules.outcome: The step list includes 'Review and call golemic submit-review --verdict approved|changes_requested --body ... --pr <N>'

business_rules.rule: Missing guidelines file (dev.md or reviewer.md under .golemic/guidelines/) is a hard error, not a silent empty string
business_rules.applies_when: Rendering any prompt that requires guidelines injection

business_rules.rule: The system prompt (prompts/dev.md or prompts/reviewer.md) is loaded from the embedded prompts/ directory and passed to pi as --append-system-prompt @<file>
business_rules.outcome: System prompt file path is returned alongside the user prompt text

interfaces.name: Prompt Renderer
interfaces.operation: RenderDev(issue, branch, verifyCommand, guidelinesPath) (systemPromptPath, userPrompt string, error)

inputs.name: issue
constraints: Title and Body must be non-empty

inputs.name: branch
constraints: Must be the full branch name including remote prefix

inputs.name: verifyCommand
constraints: Must be non-empty (required by config validation)

inputs.name: guidelinesPath
constraints: Must be an existing file path

outputs.condition: All templates and guidelines load successfully
outputs.body: systemPromptPath (path to prompts/dev.md) and userPrompt (rendered template string)

interfaces.name: Reviewer Prompt Renderer
interfaces.operation: RenderReviewer(prNumber, issue, verifyCommand, guidelinesPath) (systemPromptPath, userPrompt string, error)

outputs.condition: All templates and guidelines load successfully
outputs.body: systemPromptPath (path to prompts/reviewer.md) and userPrompt (rendered template string)

integration_contracts.operation: Read static prompt files and guidelines files
integration_contracts.failure_mapping: File not found → GUIDELINES_NOT_FOUND or TEMPLATE_NOT_FOUND

state_changes.precondition: All template inputs are valid and guidelines file exists

changes.value_source: Go template execution with issue, branch, verify_command, guidelines content

security.authentication: N/A (prompt rendering is local file I/O)
authorization_rules: Only the runner process may call the prompt renderer (internal package, no public API)

integration_points: os.ReadFile for guidelines and prompt files
architecture_constraints: Static prompts (prompts/dev.md, prompts/reviewer.md) are embedded or loaded from known paths
Guidelines injection is mandatory; missing guidelines file is a hard error
Templates are defined in Go code, not in separate files (to avoid another file loading concern)
allowed_changes: Define Go templates for dev and reviewer user prompts
forbidden_changes: Do not silently substitute empty string for missing guidelines
Do not include the diff in the reviewer prompt (agent must fetch it via git/gh)
dependencies: Standard library: text/template, os, fmt, path/filepath

acceptance_scenarios.title: Dev prompt contains all required facts verbatim
given: Issue number 42, title 'Fix bug', body 'Details here'
when: RenderDev is called with the above inputs
then: The rendered user prompt contains the issue number 42
The rendered user prompt contains the title 'Fix bug'
The rendered user prompt contains the body 'Details here'
The rendered user prompt contains the branch name golemic/issue-42
The rendered user prompt contains the verify_command 'go test ./...'
The rendered user prompt contains the content of guidelines/dev.md
The rendered user prompt contains 'golemic open-pr' as the final step
The rendered user prompt states that open-pr is only allowed after verify_command exits 0

acceptance_scenarios.title: Reviewer prompt contains all required facts verbatim
given: PR number 123, issue 42 with title and body
when: RenderReviewer is called with the above inputs
then: The rendered user prompt contains the PR number 123
The rendered user prompt contains the issue number 42 and its title/body
The rendered user prompt contains the verify_command
The rendered user prompt contains the content of guidelines/reviewer.md
The rendered user prompt contains 'golemic submit-review' as the final step

acceptance_scenarios.title: Missing guidelines file returns a named error
given: guidelines/dev.md does not exist at the expected path
then: The error message mentions the missing file path

acceptance_scenarios.title: System prompt file path is returned
then: The system prompt path (prompts/dev.md) is returned alongside the user prompt

acceptance_scenarios.title: Prompt is rendered as a string in memory
then: A user prompt string is produced in memory with all injected facts

test_cases: Dev prompt golden file: contains all expected facts
Reviewer prompt golden file: contains all expected facts
Guidelines content is injected verbatim (not truncated or modified)
Step list in dev prompt ends with open-pr
Step list in reviewer prompt ends with submit-review
System prompt paths are returned correctly
non_functional_requirements: Templates use Go text/template (no html/template escaping)
Guidelines content is injected as-is (raw markdown)
definition_of_done: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test -count=1 ./... is green
Golden file tests verify rendered prompt output

decision_log.decision: Static role rules go into prompts/dev.md and prompts/reviewer.md (system prompt); run-specific facts go into Go-templated user prompts
decision_log.rationale: Specified in §2.10: 'die statischen Rollen-Regeln stehen im System-Prompt (prompts/dev.md / prompts/reviewer.md), alle lauf-spezifischen Fakten im gerenderten User-Prompt'

decision_log.decision: Use Go text/template for rendering user prompts
decision_log.rationale: Specified in backlog: 'Go-Templates für die User-Prompts'

decision_log.decision: Missing guidelines file is a hard error, not a fallback to empty string
decision_log.rationale: Specified in backlog: 'Fehlende Guideline-Datei → Fehler (fail-closed), nicht leerer String'

decision_log.decision: System prompt files go into prompts/ directory (already exists with .gitkeep)
decision_log.rationale: prompts/ directory exists and is the designated location for prompt files

decision_log.decision: Guidelines templates are stored in internal/preflight/templates/guidelines/ and copied to .golemic/guidelines/ during preflight scaffolding
decision_log.rationale: The preflight package embeds the guidelines templates; the prompt package reads them from .golemic/guidelines/ after scaffolding

decision_log.decision: Reviewer guidelines template exists at the same location as dev guidelines template
decision_log.rationale: Both dev.md and reviewer.md templates are embedded in the preflight package at internal/preflight/templates/guidelines/

codebase_evidence.finding: prompts/ directory exists with a .gitkeep placeholder; ready for prompt files
Guidelines template with required sections (Stack, Build/Test, Schranken) exists; populated by human after preflight scaffolding
Reviewer guidelines template with required sections exists; populated by human after preflight scaffolding
